クラス ReportViewAdapter

java.lang.Object
visualization.ReportViewAdapter
public final class ReportViewAdapter extends Object
Adapts typed simulation/analysis data into report-facing labels and DOM keys.

Display names, HTML-safe row keys, and report-oriented stat aggregates are boundary concerns owned by the visualization layer, not by combat logic.
